notes: Captured live owner expansion evidence for one product-variant-owned metafield and one collection-owned metafield. The comparison covers the shared `metafieldsSet` mutation payload plus immediate downstream `product.variants.metafield(s)`, `productVariant.metafield(s)`, and `collection.metafield(s)` reads.
